expectations.evidence: Output is a single index.html file with embedded CSS in <style> tag (lines 12-687)
Hero section at lines 704-723 contains h1 'クリエイティブでモダンなデザイン', subtitle, and CTA buttons
Three portfolio cards at lines 735-789 with titles 'SaaS Webアプリケーション', 'スタートアップブランディング', 'High performance Website'
Contact form at lines 802-884 with fields for name, email, message (plus additional fields for company and service)
Media queries at lines 576-630 provide responsive breakpoints for 768px and 480px
Lines 8-10 import Google Fonts (Manrope and Sora font families)
Uses emoji characters as functional icons in card-image elements (🎨, ✨, 🚀 at lines 737, 756, 775)
